title: [Sacramento, CA]
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

```json

  "claims": [
    "AB 222 addresses the growing energy demands of artificial intelligence (AI) development.",
    "The bill ensures that developers, data centers, and utility providers work collectively to reduce energy costs for Californians who do not directly benefit from AI technologie
raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 222 addresses the growing energy demands of artificial intelligence (AI) development.",
    "The bill ensures that developers, data centers, and utility providers work collectively to reduce energy costs for Californians who do not directly benefit from AI technologies.",
    "AI developers creating large, energy-intensive models will collect and publish data on the total energy consumed during the development process.",
    "The energy consumption data published by AI developers will be made publicly accessible on their websites.",
    "Operators of data centers will be required to report their annual energy consumption and efficiency metrics to the California Energy Commission.",
    "Data center reports will include total electricity usage, renewable energy contributions, and energy used specifically for AI development.",
    "Reports from data centers will enable the California Energy Commission to monitor energy trends and evaluate the impact on the state's electrical grid.",
    "The California Energy Commission will craft policies to ensure sustainable operations in energy-intensive sectors.",
    "AB 222 introduces safeguards to prevent energy costs from being unfairly passed on to ratepayers.",
    "The California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) will evaluate costs associated with building or upgrading data centers.",
    "The CPUC is directed to minimize the shifting of expenses to Californians not benefiting directly from data centers when utilities seek rate increases.",
    "Artificial intelligence comes with an enormous energy footprint.",
    "AB 222 prioritizes transparency and aligns technological innovation with California's clean energy goals.",
    "The bill sets a standard for responsible AI development and energy usage."
  ]
}
```
